prompt: Photorealistic close-up photography of two branded signs for a construction design company. Second, in the foreground on the pavement, a black powder-coated folding metal A-frame sign displaying the same structural LK mark in gold with DESIGN AND BUILD below. Shot on 50mm lens, natural daylight, cinematic colour grading, warm gold against dark surfaces, Adelaide office precinct, premium construction company branding, sharp focus on signage details, professional commercial photography.
